title: Bogan
subTitle: A police officer who is working on a bank robbery case arrests a man who is harbouring a supernatural secret.

title: Tu Hi Mera Pyar
subTitle: Raised in the US, a progressive Vijay does not believe in marriage. After he is forced into it by his father, it takes a long time for him to realise the significance of the institution.

title: Cakewalk
subTitle: A young woman who works as a chef faces various challenges as she tries to maintain a balance between her personal and professional commitments.

title: Colors Cineplex
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Prince
subTitle: A guy who has extraordinary powers is the only one that knows about the robbery which caused his memory loss. The secret behind the robbery has put the entire human race at risk.

title: Coolie Raja
subTitle: When an arrogant businessman and his daughter frame a poor porter in a rape case, he hatches a plan to marry her and teach them a lesson.

title: FIR
subTitle: Young Irfan Ahmed gets caught up in inexplicable circumstances that shatter his life, but the media are quick to portray him as evil.

title: Vishal in Laatti Charge
subTitle: Muruganantham is ordered to assault Vellai for misbehaving with the Deputy's daughter. However, when Vellai's father Guna, a mafia king, learns of this, he unleashes his wrath on the former.

title: Yodha
subTitle: When a group of terrorists hijack a passenger plane, an off-duty soldier crafts a plan to thwart the hijackers and safeguard the passengers' survival despite the engine's failure.

title: Avunu
subTitle: A couple moves into a gated community. Soon after, the married woman feels she is being stalked by an evil spirit, who seems to derive voyeuristic pleasure at her expense.

title: Aamaa Part 2
subTitle: Mohini and Harsha move to the city to start fresh. However, Captain Raju tracks them down and tries to molest Mohini.

title: Hungama
subTitle: A trio in love triangle, a couple from the countryside, a disgruntled crime lord, and a myriad of other eccentric characters dance to a cacophony of reckless lies and misunderstandings.

title: Hungama
subTitle: A trio in love triangle, a couple from the countryside, a disgruntled crime lord, and a myriad of other eccentric characters dance to a cacophony of reckless lies and misunderstandings.

title: Ek Hi Maqsad
subTitle: Captain Ram is a military commando who rescues Patil, the tourism minister of Karnataka from Jihadi terrorists. Taking a liking for his heroics, Patil engages him to provide security.

title: Son Of Devil
subTitle: After Karan saves Sonu from a group of thugs, the latter falls in love with him.

title: Colors Cineplex
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: 1947: Earth
subTitle: The disaster of Indian/Pakistani partition seen through the eyes of a child - Lenny, an eight-year-old crippled girl - from Lahore, the Punjabi city that saw some of the bloodiest pogroms. The experiences, hopes and fears of this young girl provide an intense portrait of the period.

title: Ek Aur Mrityu Pujan
subTitle: When the shadow of evil starts taking over the world, a warrior fights for good, as an avatar of Narasimha, a lion god, who is known for destroying evil.

title: Junga
subTitle: Junga, a simple bus conductor, lives with his mother and learns that his father lost their ancestral property to Chettiyar. However, he soon turns to the life of crime to retrieve it.

title: Dhruva
subTitle: A committed police officer is on a very dangerous mission to destroy the most corrupt person in the country, Siddharth Abhimanyu.

title: Vivegam
subTitle: A former counter-terrorism agent sets out to exact revenge on the friends who betray him and work for a secret agency.

title: Stree
subTitle: In the eerie townscape of Chanderi, dressmaker Vicky falls for a mysterious woman with a supernatural aura. His heart sinks at the possibility that she might be Stree, the resentful man-hunter.

title: The Family Star
subTitle: Govardhan, a devoted architect from Hyderabad, juggles supporting his extended family while seeking a partner who understands his commitments. When he discovers Aadhya's thesis on his family, he challenges her, leading to unexpected twists.

title: Harom Hara
subTitle: When a man loses job and faces financial ruin, he enters the illegal arms trade, eventually becoming South India's most notorious arms dealer.

title: Harom Hara
subTitle: When a man loses job and faces financial ruin, he enters the illegal arms trade, eventually becoming South India's most notorious arms dealer.

title: Thadam
subTitle: Identical twins are taken into police custody in a murder case.

title: What the Fish
subTitle: A grumpy old woman travels abroad and puts her niece in charge of her house in Delhi, only to return to utter chaos and mess.

title: Pankh
subTitle: Film highlighting a phenomenon peculiar and exclusive to the Indian film industry, the practise of casting children in roles opposite to their natural genders.

title: Tu Hi Mera Pyar
subTitle: Raised in the US, a progressive Vijay does not believe in marriage. After he is forced into it by his father, it takes a long time for him to realise the significance of the institution.

title: Parole
subTitle: Due to some unfortunate events, a communist leader gets arrested and is imprisoned, but is compelled to come out on parole to solve a mystery he left behind.

title: Gully Rowdy
subTitle: A young man attempts to balance a new love interest with the expectations of his friends, who expect him to carry on his rowdy ways.

title: Gabbar Is Back
subTitle: A vigilante military network eliminates corrupt officials. As pressure mounts on the police to find out who is responsible for the killings, a special investigator is summoned to track them down.

title: Rudhran
subTitle: A man's life takes an unexpected turn when he stumbles upon a criminal network. Determined to bring the truth to light, he sets out to expose the organisation and protect his loved ones.

title: Hanu Man
subTitle: A man who accidentally attains superpowers clashes with one who is desperate to get his own.

title: My Boss Bajrangbali
subTitle: An orphan is an ardent devotee of Lord Hanuman and vows to keep his devotion intact - even against mobsters that threaten to kill.
